reasoning_model_1: Model 1 failed strictly on Content Accuracy. reasoning_model_2: Model 2 followed the instructions perfectly. Content Accuracy is perfect; it read exactly '今天气温是二十度，多云。' (00:00-00:02). model_comparison: Model 1 failed to adhere to the text constraint, generating a completely different and longer script than requested. Additionally, its tone was cheerful and expressive rather than neutral. Model 2 adhered strictly to the text and provided a perfectly neutral, uncolored delivery. Model 2 is the clear winner.
